headline: Assessing Bunge Global (BG) Valuation After Strong 3 Month And 1 Year Share Price Returns
summary: Bunge Global (BG) has been drawing attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a return of about 24% over the past 3 months and 67% over the past year. See our latest analysis for Bunge Global. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 1-day share price return of 0.78% and a 7-day share price return showing a 4.25% decline. However, the 90-day share price return of 23.93% and 1-year total shareholder return of 67.42% point to momentum that has been strong over a longer...
